name: StatsServiceBook Codespace
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends podman nodejs npm chromium libatk1.0-0t64 libatk-bridge2.0-0t64 libgtk-3-0t64 libasound2t64 libgbm1 libpangocairo-1.0-0 fonts-liberation && sudo bash /workspaces/StatsServiceBook/scripts/install-pwsh-in-codespaces.sh
